description: Create 12 AI-powered email services in apps/quantmail/backend/services/ that use @quant/ai AIEngine for inference, with Zod schemas for input/output validation and co-located test files.
steps: Create apps/quantmail/backend/services/ai-triage.service.ts - Classifies emails into act_now/delegate/read_later/ignore using AIEngine.infer(). Include TriageResultSchema with category, reason, urgency (0-1), suggestedAction. Methods: triage(email, userId), triageBatch(emails, userId).

Create apps/quantmail/backend/services/ai-reply.service.ts - Drafts reply in user's writing style. Takes original email + user writing samples. Uses AIEngine.infer() with system prompt for style matching. Methods: draftReply(originalEmail, userId, options?), learnStyleFromDraft(draft, userId).

Create apps/quantmail/backend/services/ai-summarize.service.ts - Summarizes long email threads (47-email thread to 3-sentence summary). Takes array of thread messages. Methods: summarizeThread(messages, userId), summarizeSingle(email, userId).

Create apps/quantmail/backend/services/ai-compose.service.ts - Converts bullet points to professional email. Input: bullets array + context (recipient, tone, format). Methods: composeFomBullets(bullets, context, userId), improveEmail(draft, instructions, userId).

Create apps/quantmail/backend/services/ai-unsubscribe.service.ts - Detects never-opened newsletters and provides batch unsubscribe. Methods: detectNewsletters(emails, userId), generateUnsubscribeActions(newsletters), executeBatchUnsubscribe(actions, userId).

Create apps/quantmail/backend/services/ai-followup.service.ts - Detects commitments like 'I'll send X by Friday' and creates reminders. Methods: detectCommitments(email, userId), createReminder(commitment, userId), getActiveReminders(userId).

Create apps/quantmail/backend/services/ai-meeting-extract.service.ts - Detects meeting requests and extracts calendar event details. Methods: extractMeetingDetails(email, userId), createCalendarEvent(details, userId).

Create apps/quantmail/backend/services/ai-tone-shift.service.ts - Rewrites email tone (formal/casual/diplomatic/urgent). Methods: shiftTone(emailText, targetTone, userId), detectCurrentTone(emailText, userId).

Create apps/quantmail/backend/services/ai-attachment-summary.service.ts - Summarizes PDF/DOCX attachments without opening. Methods: summarizeAttachment(attachmentMetadata, userId), previewContent(attachmentId, userId).

Create apps/quantmail/backend/services/ai-contact-context.service.ts - Provides full interaction history when hovering over a sender. Methods: getContactContext(contactEmail, userId), getRecentInteractions(contactEmail, userId, limit?).

Create apps/quantmail/backend/services/smart-send-time.service.ts - Calculates optimal send time per recipient based on engagement history. Methods: predictOptimalTime(recipientEmail, userId), getRecipientPatterns(recipientEmail, userId).

Create apps/quantmail/backend/services/ai-style-learner.service.ts - Learns user's writing style from sent items. Methods: analyzeSentItems(sentEmails, userId), getStyleProfile(userId), generateStyledDraft(content, userId).

Create co-located test files in apps/quantmail/backend/__tests__/ for each of the 12 services above. Each test file should mock AIEngine.infer() and verify: correct prompt construction, proper Zod schema validation of output, error handling for invalid AI responses, batch operations where applicable.
acceptance_criteria: All 12 service files exist in apps/quantmail/backend/services/ with proper class exports
Each service uses Zod schemas for input/output validation
Each service constructor takes AIEngine (from @quant/ai) as dependency
AI triage classifies test emails and returns structured TriageResultSchema output
AI reply generates contextually appropriate response matching user style
Thread summarization handles arrays of messages and returns concise summary
Bullet-to-email converts bullet array to properly formatted email
All services use TypeScript strict mode with no 'any' types
All 12 test files exist and pass with mocked AI responses
verification: Run: NODE_OPTIONS='' npx vitest run --reporter=verbose 2>&1 | tail -50 (from apps/quantmail or repo root with appropriate config)
